name: GAF_SyteLine_RoutingInsert_Tool_v1
description: Add routing operations (manufacturing steps) to a standard job in SyteLine

data.api_docs:
Method: POST
Endpoint: /update/SLJobRoutes
CRITICAL: The endpoint above is RELATIVE — the service path 'CSI/IDORequestService/ido' is prepended automatically. Do NOT repeat the service path in the endpoint or add tenant names, config values, 'api', 'invoke', or extra segments.
Headers:
X-Infor-MongooseConfig: <site>
Content-Type: application/json
Body:
Batch insert multiple routing operations in one call:
{
  "IDOName": "SLJobRoutes",
  "RefreshAfterSave": true,
  "Changes": [
    {
      "Action": 1,
      "Properties": [
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Job", "Value": "         2"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Suffix", "Value": "0"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "OperNum", "Value": "10"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Wc", "Value": "FA-400"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "SetupHrsT", "Value": "1.00"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "RunHrsTLbr", "Value": "0.50"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "RunHrsTMch", "Value": "0.00"}
      ]
    },
    {
      "Action": 1,
      "Properties": [
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Job", "Value": "         2"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Suffix", "Value": "0"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "OperNum", "Value": "20"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Wc", "Value": "INS-20"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "SetupHrsT", "Value": "0.00"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "RunHrsTLbr", "Value": "0.25"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "RunHrsTMch", "Value": "0.00"}
      ]
    }
  ]
}
NOTE: Action 1 = insert. Include ALL operations in a single Changes array.
Operation numbers increment by 10 (10, 20, 30...).
Job number must be left-padded with spaces to 10 chars.
Work center code (Wc) must be a valid existing work center.
Example Request:
POST /update/SLJobRoutes
Add two operations to job 2: assembly at FA-400, then inspection at INS-20:
data.responseInstructions:
The API responds with a JSON object indicating success or failure.
Key Response Fields:
- Success: Boolean indicating if all inserts succeeded
- Message: Error message if Success is false
- Items: Array of created routing operation records
Each operation should appear in Items with its Job, OperNum, Wc, and _ItemId.
If any operation fails, check the Message for details (common: invalid work center code).
CRITICAL - IF ERROR OCCURS INCLUDE THE BELOW IN RESPONSE
  ---DEBUG---
  FULL_URL: [The complete URL that was called]
  FULL_PAYLOAD: [The exact request body sent (JSON format)]
  FULL_RESPONSE: [The complete API response received]
  ---END DEBUG---

instructions:
Add routing operations to a standard job. BATCH: ALL operations in one Changes array.
Fields: Job (10-char padded), Suffix='0', OperNum (10,20,30...), Wc (work center code), SetupHrsT, RunHrsTLbr, RunHrsTMch.
Work centers: FA-400, AS-500, MC-300, CUT-10, DRL-10, GRD-10, PNT-10, INS-20, PG-300, ST-100, MLD-10.
SITE: <site> placeholder = [TENANT]_DALS from agent input.
